common.loading_description: We are preparing your Aurali experience and connecting the required information to show the right interface.

nav.password_reset_instructions: If you registered using your email and password, you will receive a password reset email.

audio_recorder.title: Record event account
audio_recorder.mic_error: Could not access microphone. Please check permissions.

reason_dialog.reason_placeholder: Briefly describe the reason for this action...

welcome.title: Your workspace is ready!
welcome.description: You completed the initial setup. Before creating your first legal process, there are some key configurations that will make the workflow operate correctly.
welcome.req1: Create at least one document template
welcome.req3: Link templates to the generation nodes

templates.title: Create your document templates
templates.description: Templates are the base documents (powers of attorney, contracts, letters) that the workflow generates automatically for each process. You can use variables like {CLIENT.FIRST_NAME} that are replaced with the client's real data.
templates.tip: Go to Settings → Document templates to create your first template.

email_nodes.title: Configure the email nodes
email_nodes.description: The workflow contains nodes that send emails automatically: one to send the form to the client and another to send the final documents. Verify the subject, body and attachments of each one.
email_nodes.tip: Open the editor in Settings → Workflows and click on each email node to configure it.

doc_nodes.title: Link templates to the workflow
doc_nodes.description: The "Generate documents" node needs to know which templates to produce. Once your templates are created, open them in the workflow editor and select them within the node.
doc_nodes.tip: In the workflow editor, click on the "Generate documents" node and select the templates from the configuration panel.

preview.title: This is what the processes section looks like
preview.description: Each row is a legal process with its number, client, identity document and current status. The workflow advances automatically between states as you complete the required actions.
preview.tip: Create your first process from the "New process" button in the Legal Processes section.

fields.access_link: Did you access a suspicious link?

list.empty_desc: Start a new process using the form above.

payments.modal_description: Record a payment made by the client.

form.description: Form to create a new process
form.title: Start New Process
form.success_desc: The process has been created successfully.

archive.confirm_description: Are you sure you want to archive this process? The process will become inactive but its data will be preserved. You can revert this action later.
archive.revert_confirm_description: Do you want to restore this process to its previous status? The process will return to the state it was in before being archived.

decline.confirm_description: Are you sure you want to decline this process? This indicates the process was rejected and will not continue. This action cannot be undone.

payment.confirm_description: Are you sure you want to mark this process as paid? This indicates that the client has made the payment for the start of the legal process.
payment.revert_description: Are you sure you want to revert the payment status? The process will return to the completed state.
payment.confirm_revert_desc: Are you sure you want to revert the payment? The status will return to 'In process'.

timeline.title: Process history
timeline.empty: No events recorded for this process.

search.placeholder: Search by name, email, phone or ID...

home.title: Aurali.app
home.description: The digital employee for law firms and lawyers that helps you automate internal processes and be more effective in time use, so your focus is on what truly matters.

step3.title: Step 3 of 4: Configure banks
step3.description: Select the banks your organization will work with. You can change them later.

step4.title: Step 4 of 4: Document types
step4.description: Configure the identity document types your organization will accept.

shell.eyebrow: Secure access to your legal platform
shell.loginTitle: Return to your legal operation with full context
shell.loginDescription: Sign in to Aurali to review processes, documents, and automations from a workspace designed for clarity across your team.
shell.signUpTitle: Start running your firm with less friction
shell.signUpDescription: Create your account and begin organizing intake, document generation, and follow-up from a single platform.

steps.3: Team and client kept in sync

stats.time: less time spent on manual coordination
stats.documents: documents and flows ready for review

login.title: Login
login.description: Enter your email below to login to your account

signUp.title: Create Account
signUp.description: Enter your email below to create your account

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset it

sign_up_success.title: Thank you for signing up!
sign_up_success.content: You've successfully signed up. Please check your email to confirm your account before signing in.

formats.title: Document Templates
formats.description: Manage templates for legal process document generation.
formats.form_description: Define the name and content of the template.
formats.field_name_placeholder: e.g. Bank letter, Power of attorney...
formats.empty: No templates created yet. Create the first one using the button above.
formats.delete_description: Are you sure you want to delete this template? This action cannot be undone.

variables.title: Dynamic variables
variables.description: Click to insert into the editor or type them manually.
variables.manual_hint: You can also type them directly in the editor using the format '{GROUP.VARIABLE}'.

hero.subtitle: Aurali automates your legal processes from client intake to document generation so your team can focus on what matters: legal judgment and client relationships.

steps.generation: AI drafts documents with real variables

socialProof.title: Designed for lawyers and law firms across Latin America

problem.title: Your time is too valuable to waste on paperwork
problem.description: Aurali removes manual coordination and turns every legal process into a visible, measurable, repeatable operation.

manual.title: Manual processes
manual.description: Coordination through WhatsApp, spreadsheets, and email with no real control or traceability.

repetitive.title: Repeating documents
repetitive.description: Every claim, power of attorney, or letter gets drafted from scratch even when the process is the same.

visibility.title: No visibility
visibility.description: You do not know the real-time status of each case or which task is slowing down the team.

features.eyebrow: Everything you need, in one place
features.title: Built to adapt to the way you work
features.description: One platform to orchestrate intake, automation, documents, and follow-up without relying on disconnected tools.

workflows.title: Automated workflows
workflows.description: Define once how your process works. Aurali handles execution automatically.

documents.title: Professional document editor
documents.description: Build templates with headers, footers, columns, and signature spaces. Generate complete documents with real case variables in seconds.

ai.title: Artificial intelligence
ai.description: Built-in AI to draft, review, and adapt documents to your legal criteria.

multiLawyer.title: Multi-lawyer collaboration
multiLawyer.description: Assign cases, control permissions, and collaborate with your team from a single workspace.

notifications.title: Smart notifications
notifications.description: Clients receive automatic updates at every stage of the process.

visibility.title: Analytics and financial control
visibility.description: Real-time dashboard with the status of every process, plus billed, collected, and pending fee metrics and your firm's collection rate.

howItWorks.title: From intake to delivery, without friction
howItWorks.description: Every stage connects to the next one so your operation moves forward with less noise and more control.

step1.title: Create the process
step1.description: Register the client and case type in seconds with the right information from the start.

step2.title: The workflow does the work
step2.description: Forms, validations, and communications run automatically based on your rules.

step3.title: AI generates the documents
step3.description: Use live case data to produce review-ready drafts without copy-paste work.

step4.title: Sign, deliver, and close
step4.description: Documents are ready for review, client delivery, and case closure.

benefits.title: More time for what truly matters
benefits.description: Your team gains operational capacity without losing control, traceability, or document quality.

stats.time: less time spent on administrative tasks

list.one: It adapts to your workflow and structure: banks, document types, and settings configured per organization.
list.two: No learning curve: intuitive from day one.
list.three: Secure and confidential: your data and processes stay under your control.
list.four: Continuous updates shaped by what your operation actually needs.

testimonials.title: Lawyers who want to run with less friction
testimonials.description: Placeholder references to show how Aurali credibility content could look in production.

one.quote: Aurali gave us a clear way to standardize processes without losing legal judgment. Today the team always knows what comes next in each case.
one.author: Maria Fernanda Rojas

two.quote: Document generation stopped being a bottleneck. Now we review and approve instead of drafting everything from scratch.
two.author: Sebastian Mejia

three.quote: We moved from scattered messages to a visible workflow for both the team and the client.
three.author: Valentina Pardo

finalCta.title: Start automating your law firm today
finalCta.description: No credit card. No commitment. Just a smarter way to run your legal practice.

ai_variables.title: AI Variables
ai_variables.description: Create custom AI-generated variables to use in your document templates.
ai_variables.empty_description: Create custom variables with prompts so AI can automatically generate content when producing documents.
ai_variables.field_key_hint: Used in templates as {AI_NAME}. Auto-generated from the name.
ai_variables.field_description_placeholder: What this variable is used for
ai_variables.field_prompt_placeholder: Write the facts of the banking fraud case in formal legal language, in third person, based on the client's account and attached documents...
ai_variables.tips_title: How to write a good prompt

tips.specific: Be specific: state which part of the document you want to generate
tips.formal: Define the tone: formal, legal, concise, etc.
tips.third_person: Specify grammatical person: third person, first person plural
tips.vague: Avoid vague instructions like "write something about the case"
tips.no_context: Don't repeat context — it's sent automatically

ai_variables.examples_description: Show the AI how you write this field so it can match your style.
ai_variables.example_placeholder: Write an example of how you draft this field...
ai_variables.delete_confirm_description: This action cannot be undone. Templates using this variable will have an unresolved token.

validation.prompt_too_short: The prompt must be at least 20 characters.
validation.injection_override: The prompt contains disallowed instruction override patterns.
validation.injection_persona: The prompt contains disallowed role-change instructions.
validation.injection_extract: The prompt contains disallowed extraction instructions.
validation.injection_delimiter: The prompt contains disallowed control delimiters.

account.personal_data_description: Basic information about your professional profile.
account.organizations_description: Organizations you belong to and your role in each one.
account.signature_description: Image that will be automatically inserted into generated documents.
account.signature_empty_hint: Your signature will appear in generated documents

workflows.title: Workflow Settings
workflows.description: Manage legal process types and their automated stages.
workflows.name: Template name
workflows.mobile_blocked_title: This view is not available on phones
workflows.mobile_blocked_description: You can review workflow settings from a desktop or a wider screen.
workflows.mobile_blocked_hint_description: The full workflow editor and preview need more space to inspect nodes, connections, and configuration comfortably.
workflows.no_active_organization: You don't have an active organization.
workflows.readonly_description: Read-only view of your organization's active workflow.

workflow_editor.email_attachment_hint: This email will have attached documents. When the step runs, a selection of the generated process documents will be shown to choose which ones to attach.
